name: Orange-Glazed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ham into 3/4-inch chunks.
2. Cut celery on a slant, then into 1/2-inch chunks.
3. In a 1 1/2-quart casserole, cook ham, celery, and 1 tablespoon water, covered, at high power for 3 to 4 minutes or until heated through. Drain the orange sections with pineapple; reserve 1/3 cup liquid.
4. In a 1-cup measure, stir together cornstarch and ground ginger. Stir into reserved liquid.
5. Cook uncovered at high power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
6. Drain the ham and celery mixture. Stir in the thickened sauce.
7. Stir in orange sections with pineapple.
8. Cook uncovered at high power for about 1 1/2 minutes or until heated through. Serve with hot cooked rice if desired.
